heading: Definitions
label: 20107 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973ee–6 of Title 42
Effective DateSection applicable with respect to elections taking place after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 31, 1985section 9 of Pub. L. 98–435section 20101 of this title

children.text: “accessible” means accessible to handicapped and elderly individuals for the purpose of voting or registration, as determined under guidelines established by the chief election officer of the State involved;
“elderly” means 65 years of age or older;

“Federal election” means a general, special, primary, or runoff election for the office of President or Vice President, or of Senator or Representative in, or Delegate or Resident Commissioner to, the Congress;
“handicapped” means having a temporary or permanent physical disability; and

“State” means a State of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, and any territory or possesssion of the United States.1So in original. Probably should be “possession”.1
